prompt: A billing report for the quarter: hours logged per client and the invoices we should be sending out.
wire:
<App name="Quarterly Billing Report">
  <Query id="hostGetDashboard" tool="host_getDashboard" input={{}}/>
  <Query id="hostListDeadlines" tool="host_listDeadlines" input={{}}/>
  <Stack gap={4}>
    <Row gap={2}>
      <Text variant="heading" text="Quarterly Billing Report"/>
      <Badge label="Q3 2026" tone="neutral"/>
    </Row>
    <Callout tone="warning" title="Billing data not available on this host">
      This practice tool does not expose hours logged, invoice amounts, or billing records. The report below shows document collection progress per client — the closest available proxy for work completed this quarter.
    </Callout>
    <Grid columns={3}>
      <Stat label="Total clients" value={hostGetDashboard.totalClients}/>
      <Stat label="Documents outstanding" value={hostGetDashboard.documentsOutstanding}/>
      <Stat label="Documents received" value={hostGetDashboard.documentsReceived}/>
    </Grid>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={3}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Client document progress — Q3 2026"/>
        <Text variant="caption" text="Sorted by deadline. Use this as a proxy for billing readiness: clients with all documents verified are ready to invoice."/>
        <DataTable rows={hostListDeadlines.data} searchable paginate={20} sortBy="deadline asc" filterableBy={["status", "assignedStaff"]} columns={[{ key: "name", label: "Client" }, { key: "entityType", label: "Entity" }, { key: "assignedStaff", label: "Staff" }, { key: "deadline", label: "Filing Deadline", format: "date" }, { key: "documentsReceived", label: "Docs Received", align: "end" }, { key: "documentsTotal", label: "Docs Total", align: "end" }, { key: "status", label: "Status", format: "enum" }]} emptyState="No clients found."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
    <Surface>
      <Stack gap={2}>
        <Text variant="heading" text="Hours logged and invoices"/>
        <Disclaimer title="No billing tools available" reason="This host does not provide tools for hours logged, time tracking, or invoice generation. To produce a true billing report, connect a time-tracking or billing integration (e.g. QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or your practice management billing module)."/>
      </Stack>
    </Surface>
  </Stack>
</App>

props.title: Billing data not available on this host

props.text: This practice tool does not expose hours logged, invoice amounts, or billing records. The report below shows document collection progress per client — the closest available proxy for work completed this quarter.
Sorted by deadline. Use this as a proxy for billing readiness: clients with all documents verified are ready to invoice.

props.title: No billing tools available
props.reason: This host does not provide tools for hours logged, time tracking, or invoice generation. To produce a true billing report, connect a time-tracking or billing integration (e.g. QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or your practice management billing module).
